demo.title: quotient-markets.ts

setup: Sign up at dev.quotient.social — new accounts include free credits
Get API key from the Quotient account/developer area
Set `QUOTIENT_API_KEY` env var for direct API key auth
Or use x402 flow: set `EVM_PRIVATE_KEY` and install `@x402/fetch` + `@x402/evm`
Prefer Bankr wallet signing (`/agent/sign`) when available — set `BANKR_API_KEY`
